classification.label: corrupted_or_orphaned_migration_history
classification.why_not_a: 202605070002 is absent remotely, but remote history also contains remote-only versions not present in the local migrations directory, so this is not a clean missing-head-only case
classification.why_not_c: no partial ownership columns were observed live; the stronger problem is orphaned/remote-only migration history
classification.why_not_e: DNS failure exists on the direct DB host path, but management-API reads succeeded and independently confirmed history/schema divergence

operator_apply_readiness.reason: dry-run is blocked by remote-only migration history entries; operator approval should proceed to reconciliation planning, not to applying 202605070002 yet

evidence: Remote migration list does not include 202605070002 on the remote side
